/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../../bin/libggml.so.0.10.2 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ronen/scraper/build/bin: -ldl ../../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.10.2 ../../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.10.2
